arts.ttl: 'I won the treble with Man Utd - I was convinced my team-mate would become manager'
arts.sum: Some of Manchester United's treble winning outfit have gone on to pursue careers in management and Teddy Sheringham had tipped Gary Neville to eventually lead the Red Devils

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford 'is handed England lifeline' by Thomas Tuchel as the incoming Three Lions boss 'contacts the Man United forward to tell him he is ESSENTIAL to his plans'
arts.sum: The Three Lions are about to enter the final international break of the year and their last under Lee Carsley before Tuchel takes over in January ahead of World Cup qualifying.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Ruben Amorim planning shock swoop for ex-Man City star?
arts.sum: Incoming Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim is reportedly interested in bringing Juventus defender and ex-Manchester City man Danilo to Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals the one player he can't wait to reunite with at Man Utd
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is about to take over control at Manchester United - and there is one player he is particularly looking forward to working with on the training pitch at Carrington

arts.ttl: Roberto De Zerbi revealed Manchester United contract offer to Marseille squad
arts.sum: The dust has not yet settled following Olympique de Marseille’s 3-1 defeat to AJ Auxerre on Friday evening. It was possibly the worst performance from the club so far this…

arts.ttl: Manchester United Predicted Lineup vs. Leicester City: Premier League
arts.sum: Manchester United squares off against Leicester City in Premier League action at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd target Juventus' Danilo - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim wants to bring Juventus' Danilo to Manchester United, Sporting's Ousmane Diomande is a target for Arsenal and Real Madrid want Sergio Ramos back.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy trying to ‘make things better’ at Manchester United
arts.sum: The interim boss is taking charge of one last match at home to Leicester on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy sends stern warning to Ruben Amorim with no funds for new Man Utd boss
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has underlined the challenge that faces Ruben Amorim at Manchester United with the incoming manager set to be hampered by a lack of funds in the transfer market

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim set for job talks with Ruud van Nistelrooy as Man Utd legend gets key backing
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will begin life as Manchester United's new manager on Monday and his first task will be to decide the future of caretaker boss and ex-Red Devils striker Ruud van Nistelrooy
